name: DocuGuard – AI TamperLens
tagline: Detect document tampering & AI-generated forgery for banking, KYC and claims.
description: An AI-powered forensics platform that inspects PDFs and images to flag tampering and AI-generated forgery. It combines document-native forensics, pixel-level checks, OCR, and optional multimodal LLM reasoning — running entirely on CPU with no GPU dependency, making it cost-efficient to deploy at scale.
roi: Cuts manual document review time for KYC and claims onboarding
Reduces fraud losses by catching tampered and synthetic documents early
CPU-only design avoids GPU infrastructure cost
Reusable across banking, insurance and lending workflows

name: FD Rates with Foundry
tagline: Enterprise Fixed-Deposit rate aggregator powered by Azure AI Foundry agents.
description: A production-grade aggregator that collects Fixed Deposit rates from Indian banks using Azure AI Foundry agents with custom function tools (fetch webpage, PDF and image). It supports parallel scraping, HTTP caching, robots.txt compliance and multiple deployment topologies from App Service to AKS — built for high availability and cost optimization.
roi: Replaces manual rate collection across dozens of bank sites
Always-current data for comparison and customer advisory
Multi-region HA with one-click Deploy to Azure
Caching and parallelism reduce compute and run cost

name: Agentic Email Processing
tagline: Hands-free email intake with agents for contract extraction & verification.
description: An event-driven, multi-agent system that ingests email via Logic Apps and orchestrates AI agents for contract data extraction, form verification and security checks. Infrastructure is provisioned as code with Bicep across Azure AI Foundry, Storage and Document Intelligence, with a Flask dashboard for visibility.
roi: Automates inbox-to-data intake with no manual handling
Reduces review effort for contracts and onboarding forms
Event-driven design scales with volume on demand
IaC makes the solution repeatable across environments

name: OCR Accuracy Lab
tagline: Side-by-side OCR benchmark: Azure Document Intelligence vs GPT models.
description: An interactive benchmarking app that runs the same document through Azure Document Intelligence and multiple GPT models, then scores results with an LLM-as-judge. It surfaces accuracy metrics and visual diffs so teams can make a transparent, data-driven choice of OCR provider.
roi: Removes guesswork from OCR vendor and model selection
Quantifies accuracy before committing to production
Builds customer trust with transparent, judged comparisons
Reusable harness for any new document type

name: VoiceRAG
tagline: Low-latency inbound voice bot grounded with Azure AI Search RAG.
description: A real-time inbound voice bot that compares two processing paths — Azure Voice Live versus a composed Speech SDK pipeline — while grounding answers with Retrieval Augmented Generation over Azure AI Search. Redis semantic caching and a live latency dashboard demonstrate enterprise-grade responsiveness.
roi: Delivers low-latency, natural voice interactions
Grounded answers reduce hallucination and support cost
Semantic caching cuts repeated model calls and spend
Dual-path design de-risks the voice architecture choice

name: AOAI Prompt Port
tagline: Migrate & optimize Azure OpenAI prompts across GPT deployments safely.
description: A Gradio UI that migrates and optimizes Azure OpenAI prompts between GPT deployments. It streams progress and returns a ship / no-ship decision with scoring and diffs, so teams can move to newer models with confidence and an audit trail of quality.
roi: De-risks model upgrades with automated evaluation
Ship / no-ship scoring prevents quality regressions
Speeds prompt migration that is otherwise manual
Reusable across any Azure OpenAI deployment pair
